articles.title: Monero’s Riccardo Spagni Arrested on Fraud Charges
articles.description: Riccardo Spagni, a prominent figure in the Monero cryptocurrency community, has been arrested on fraud charges. Details surrounding the allegations and the circumstances of his arrest remain under investigation, raising concerns within the crypto community about the potential impact on the Monero project.

articles.description: Veteran analyst and trader Peter Brandt is issuing a warning to Cardano holders, saying that the fifth-largest cryptocurrency could be on the brink of following Litecoin’s 2018 price trajectory. Monero’s former maintainer arrested in the US for allegations unrelated to cryptocurrency
articles.description: An arrest warrant for Riccardo Spagni was issued on July 20, 2021, at the request of the South African government. He was apprehended the same day in the United States.

Eden to Protect Sushi Traders from MEV on Ethereum
articles.description: Eden is launching a new initiative aimed at safeguarding sushi traders from Miner Extractable Value (MEV) on the Ethereum network. This move seeks to enhance the trading experience and protect users from potential exploitation by miners who can manipulate transaction orders for their benefit.
